location.office_time_required: occasional travel for project or team in-person meetings

level_signals: Minimum of 8 years of experience in product management in SaaS, IaaS or PaaS
Comp range CAD $145,840–$182,300, consistent with senior/staff IC in Canada

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Minimum of 8 years of experience in product management in SaaS, IaaS or PaaS
Proven track record of leading successful product launches and driving product strategies
Command of analytical thinking skills with the ability to use quantitative and qualitative data to make product decisions, get executive buy-in, and drive towards measurable outcomes
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to influence and collaborate at all levels and present effectively to internal and external stakeholders
Strong technical, analytical, and UI/UX design understanding and the ability to dive deep while also keeping perspective on the big picture goals
Initiative, ownership, and accountability to decode vague priorities, manage conflicting inputs, and drive initiatives forward against ambiguous and complex challenges
Experience with the cloud, APIs, communications, and/or enterprise software
Bachelor in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent practical experience

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience building products/services related to APIs, developer experience
Experience working in a regulated ecosystem

scope.surface: Onboarding and Compliance products for Senders and Numbers (gateway to Twilio's communication APIs)
scope.business_model: B2B SaaS / CPaaS — developer and enterprise-facing communication APIs
core_responsibilities: Collect and develop business requirements and collaborate with engineering teams to translate these requirements into user stories
Partner with cross functional stakeholders to drive product planning, design, execution, and delivery of product investments against defined success metrics
Develop, communicate, generate excitement for and obtain buy-in of the product vision, strategy, and roadmap
Partner with GTM to launch products and enable sales and marketing teams to obtain product adoption and growth
Conduct regular data-driven business reviews that analyze product execution and revenue/market accomplishments

compensation.notes: Pay stated in CAD: Based in British Columbia CAD $145,840–$182,300 base; Target Bonus 15%. USD equivalent not provided.

green_flags: Clear product surface and ownership area (Senders and Numbers onboarding and compliance)
Application deadline stated (July 30, 2026), indicating active hiring
Regulated domain expertise valued as a nice-to-have, not a blocker
red_flags: Role is restricted to candidates in Ontario, British Columbia, or Alberta, Canada — not open to US or other geographies
Compensation listed in CAD only; no equity or RSU mention, unusual for a Staff-level PM role at a public company
8+ years required is a hard floor with no stated equivalent path, limiting early-career or non-traditional applicants despite inclusive language
Visa sponsorship and work authorization requirements not addressed in JD
